summary: Bridge job nv23_ramsey_20260514_015423_auto_ramsey remains running and healthy; no bridge queue mutation was performed. This wake did bridge-free progress review: copied live running status/control/log snapshots into project audit files, raw-exported the 2/12 autosave MAT, generated review JSON and PNG figure, wrote work note 20260514_0224_det1p5_shiftcheck_autosave_2avg_review.md, recorded evidence and a lab-log entry, and updated work/state.md. The 2-average autosave has 180000 shots per tau point; exploratory combined ratio LS screen is highest near 1.491 MHz, close to programmed 1.5 MHz, while the prior fixed 1.192 MHz artifact-control target is weaker. This is nonterminal context only: per-average screens are not stable, no hard anomaly was found, and no T2star or 13C claim is made. Latest live status before handoff was running at 3/12 averages with final-count text 42.922 kcps, monitor last_error empty, and stop_requested=false.

next_action.reason: Running bridge occupancy blocks further bridge-touching submissions; the autosave progress review and 3/12 live status found no hard anomaly.
